programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Clear and Pheasant Danger
programme.desc: The Browns take part in a competitive pheasant hunt as a way to celebrate and give thanks for everything they have.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Mountain Life: Fowl Weather Friends
programme.desc: Birdi goes on a treacherous hunt to bring home meat for the family and save her chickens from slaughter. Noah constructs an automatic diaper machine and Gabe gets bush insight from Ami.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Mountain Life: The Chaos Before the Storm
programme.desc: Winter is approaching yet the Wolfpack is feeling the heat! Bear works furiously to finalize an addition to his home as Billy faces a new medical crisis.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Mountain Life: The Big Push
programme.desc: The Brown siblings struggle to finish their ambitious homesites as the ground begins to freeze. The Wolfpack gets the call that Rhain-Alisha has gone into labour and races to the birth.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Starting Over
programme.desc: The family sets off an adventure to build a new homestead from the ground up.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Braving Bear Territory
programme.desc: The Browns suffer a setback after a big storm hinders their ability to float foundation pilings to their land. Supplies are running low so Birdy braves the elements and goes hunting in bear territory to restock.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Eating Dust
programme.desc: From the barren salt flats to the vast desert woodland, Dave and Cody battle the elements in the sun scorched desert of Baja, Mexico. With few supplies, they each demonstrate how to make use of an unlikely resource- urine.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Stuck in the Muck
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head into the Everglades to take on the role of airboaters stuck in a sawgrass prairie marsh under the blazing Florida sun. They must seek shelter in a nearby swamp where water moccasin, python and alligators lay in wait.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Adrift
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the survival scenario of two castaways adrift at sea and show how to survive being stranded on a deserted jungle island in the South Pacific. This time, Dave goes barefoot.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Frozen Plains
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the scenario of two ranchers, stranded on the windy plains in the dead of winter. Their only survival supplies are the charred remains of a burned-down shack: an axe head, a bison hide, a glass jar, a metal tin and a steel striker.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Hippo Island
programme.desc: In Botswana's Okavango Delta, Dave and Cody seek to escape the dangerous and deadly hippo-infested marshland using only a dying GPS and waterlogged binoculars.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: In the isolated woods of Northern Maine, Cody and Dave take on the role of two travelers, lost and out of gas on an abandoned logging road. Their only resource is a broken down truck which they pillage for all it's worth including a can of dog food.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle in a Pickle
programme.desc: With shine selling at $200 a gallon, Tickle returns to the woods with two notorious outlaw shiners. Mark and Digger rediscover Popcorn Sutton's mystery multi-grain shine, and Mike dumps his partner and hires a new hand to construct a hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Corn-fed Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark and Digger contend with an unruly herd of cattle standing between them and their new still site. Tickle pulls Tim back to the woods to rediscover his roots on the outlaw side. Mike and Jerry devise a plan to access a perfectly hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Proof is in the Payoff
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes and rediscover their passion for outlaw moonshining. Mark Rogers designs a custom pot still to double distill shine he can sell for twice the price. Mark and Digger hand-build a copper mailbox still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: What Happens in the Woods
programme.desc: After returning to the backwoods, Tickle mashes in his first batch of illegal shine in six seasons. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn Sutton legacy mash before it spoils. With Daniel on the mend, Mike quietly takes on a new full-time partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Double Proof Double Cross
programme.desc: Tickle takes on his first big run of outlaw shine in over six years, but a new still design throws a wrench in the works. Mark and Huck seek a buyer willing to pay more for less. Daniel recovers from an on-the-job injury only to find he's been replaced.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Thorn in the Bride's Side

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Dress like None the Rest

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Comedian Walks Into a Bridal Salon ...

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Designer Dreams

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Wait

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Am a Bride on a Budget
programme.desc: Lauren has a $2,000 budget but is in love with a dress that will blow that budget to shreds. Shoshana is a struggling actress, paying for her own dress to complete her special day. Sara is way over budget and has to convince her father it's worth it.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Annjeannette's Story
programme.desc: When Annjeanette was nine, a campaign was established to send her to fat camp. She hated that her weight had become a source of public shame and she has struggled to overcome her food addiction. Now, she must change her habits to save her life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Vianey and Allen's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 600 lbs. each, Vianey and Allen are locked in a codependent relationship based on a shared love of food. As they head to Houston, they will soon find out if their relationship can handle the strain of growing healthy together.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Legendary Cape Lion
programme.desc: Forrest ventures home to Zimbabwe in search of the mysterious Cape Lion, a massive black-maned predator. He and the crew navigate the African bush determined to get DNA proof, facing threats of charging rhinos and huge prides of lions.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Hidden Turtle of Vietnam
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest teams up with a conservation group to save the largest turtle species in the world from extinction. Using cutting edge technology, they attempt to find a suitor for the last and only surviving giant softshell.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Recovered Evidence: The Dodo of the North
programme.desc: Featuring all-new footage from Forrest's expeditions. Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the Great Auk. The search takes him through scenic and rugged terrain in passionate search of a large flightless seabird.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Colombian Dinosaur
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Colombia, Forrest is on a mission to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman still exists. Locals believe this crocodilian resides within a lawless land inhabited by guerilla rebels, kidnappers, and deadly predators.

programme.title: Life After: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Thirty years after the worst nuclear radiation catastrophe in history, scientists have gained access to the area surrounding the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant.

programme.title: Man-Eating Zombie Cats
programme.desc: A canine-distemper pathogen could be spreading among big cats around the world, removing their fear of human civilization.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Colombian Dinosaur
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Colombia, Forrest is on a mission to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman still exists. Locals believe this crocodilian resides within a lawless land inhabited by guerilla rebels, kidnappers, and deadly predators.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild India: Tiger Jungles

programme.title: Secrets of Wild India: Elephant Kingdom
programme.desc: Explore India's diverse landscape from 21,100 feet up in the Himalayas, where one of Asia's great rivers is fed by drops of melting ice. Meet the endangered one-horned rhinoceros, and learn why wild buffalo are one the country's most dangerous animals.

programme.title: Dog: Impossible: The Tormentor

programme.title: Dog: Impossible: Don't Fear the Collar

programme.title: Dog: Impossible: Dangerous Dynamics

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Vet and Wild
programme.desc: Dr. Pol receives an emergency call from a client who finds her horse down and fears he may not make it. Suffering from a spinal cord injury, he decides to give the horse a cortisone shot.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: How Now Downed Cow?
programme.desc: In another emergency farm call, Dr. Pol must treat a dairy cow with a Left Displaced Abomasum, or a twisted stomach, which means that one of the cow's four stomachs has floated to the top of the abdominal cavity.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Up Sheep's Creek
programme.desc: Dr. Pol takes on the challenge of taking blood work from sheep.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Got Your Goat
programme.desc: A Boer goat has lost 50 pounds after refusing to eat. While examining the goat, Dr. Pol assumes the goat must have some sort of parasite.

programme.title: Mega Machines: World's Strongest Plane
programme.desc: The world's largest production cargo plane must carry a record-breaking load in a race against the clock. The Antonov 124 is an air monster that can swallow three Apache helicopters whole and features engines with more thrust than eight F16 fighter jets.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Arctic Icebreaker
programme.desc: Ice is no match for a 15,000-ton icebreaker that patrols the dangerous waters of the Arctic Ocean. Its cutting-edge engineering smashes the thickest of ice to keep shipping lanes safe for cargo ships.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Goliath of the Outback
programme.desc: The Mack Superliner is a record-breaking monster truck that can haul huge loads across the dangerous dirt roads of the Australian Outback.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Devil's Dam
programme.desc: When a dam breaks during routine maintenance, engineers fear a catastrophic flood. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how a simple miscalculation could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Trains Collide
programme.desc: After a high-speed collision of three trains during morning rush hour in London causes dozens of deaths, experts use the latest technology to investigate what caused this catastrophic crash and what secrets could prevent future disasters.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Katrina Struck
programme.desc: Hurricane Katrina is one of the worst natural disasters to ever strike American soil, but as the storm revealed widespread construction failures, it's a tragedy of engineering, too; the latest science reveals how.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Doom on the Titanic
programme.desc: New discoveries are challenging everything we know about the sinking of the Titanic, revealing that the disaster wasn't caused by a freak accident and that it may have been doomed from the start.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Cruise Ship Catastrophe
programme.desc: When a cruise ship meets disaster, the ship begins to sink and the captain flees, leaving 300 passengers stranded; now, new discoveries reveal the fatal truth behind the devastating wreck that claimed 32 lives.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Crash of the Concorde
programme.desc: The Concorde was the supersonic passenger plane that could fly from New York to London in under four hours, but after a fatal accident kills 100, experts reveal a secret history of the iconic aircraft that led to this devastating explosion.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train

programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave

programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: A Palm Beach socialite kills her husband, and then 20 years later, the same gun is used in another shooting in the family.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on Red River
programme.desc: More than 15 years after a Texas woman was found dead, floating in a river, a former Marine and a filmmaker think they can find her killer. See if they can solve a cold case that has haunted her Texas town since Mother's Day, 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Showdown
programme.desc: Two SUVs and a motorcycle race down a Texas highway. In this high speed chase between both the wife AND mistress of Bill Hall his life would hinge on a U-turn and detectives would have to decide if this was reckless driving...or murder.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Dorm Living Nightmare
programme.desc: A girls' movie night gone bad leads to a not so happy ending for this group of college roommates. Police investigate a murder that leads them halfway across the state in search of the killer.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Family Lies
programme.desc: A reunited family begins to point fingers at each other when a house fire kills one of their own. And somewhere in the ashes are the clues to a murder.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Devil in the Dance Hall
programme.desc: A murder within the small square dancing community of Texarkana, Arkansas leads investigators through a gauntlet of suspects with alibies and potential motives- including love triangles, jealousy and lots of money.

programme.title: Betrayed: Strangled by Love
programme.desc: Pretty, vivacious Dana Laskowski is busy juggling a boyfriend, a jealous ex-husband, a secret lover, and, most importantly, single mom responsibilities. She feels she's finally found the right balance when her life is cut short by someone close.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: Military UFO Encounters
programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1737 Entryway and Kitchen
programme.desc: Lisa and Tom ask Jeff to work on their 1737 stone home in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania. They ask him to address the first floor and the kitchen. Jeff and his team bring unique 1800s elements into the entryway room and give the kitchen an 1800s overhaul.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740 Little House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to restore a 1740 stone home that sits behind couple Kelly and Rob's suburban 1990s home. They call it the "little house," and it sat right in the middle of the action of one of the most famous Revolutionary War battles.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Summer Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Lauren and Dan own an amazing stone home in Montgomery County dating back to the 1850s which has a separate summer kitchen. The exterior is in great condition but the interior is crumbling.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Uncovering a 1700s Home
programme.desc: After inheriting a 1700s stone home that's been in the family since 1906, a couple calls on Jeff to peel away the dated decor. They want to uncover as much of the original history as possible. Jeff and his team refinish the wood flooring and much more.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1780 Spring House Revival
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on by John and Karine to do a total restoration of their 1780 spring house, which is in dire need of help. The joists and floorboards are almost completely rotten, and the painted stone is crumbling.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1790 Three-Room Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff meets Allen and Kathleen, a couple who wants him to restore three rooms in the original portion of their 1790 home. Jeff and his team dig into each space, uncovering a few unique original details and adding other historic features.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1803 Second Floor Overhaul
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin heads to the home of Jodie and JP to check out the original second floor of their 1803 stone home. The space has been sectioned off over time, and the homeowners want a more cohesive master suite that evokes the home's history.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Original Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is called on to renovate a dated kitchen believed to be in the same spot as the original one that was built in the 1800s. By restoring much of the kitchen's history, Jeff and team are able to bring in a classic farmhouse style to the home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Jessica Hates
programme.desc: Jessica and Gabe bought a house three years ago that has a large yard, but the deck that came with the house is literally disintegrating.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Cristina Hates
programme.desc: Anthony and Cristina have an awesome backyard pool that they can't see from their overgrown, aging deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Stephanie Hates
programme.desc: Matt and Stephanie have a seven-month-old baby and want to enjoy the summer outdoors with their little one. But their unsafe, rotting deck is keeping them indoors.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Shirley Hates
programme.desc: Paul built his wife Shirley a makeshift deck 10 years ago, but he used cheap materials and the deck is ready for a complete teardown.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Michelle Hates
programme.desc: Michelle and Courtney have four lively kids, but their postage-stamp sized deck can't fit a table on it big enough for the whole family.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Lisa Hates
programme.desc: Jeremy and Lisa are remodelling their lakeside cottage in their dream house, but the bland, boring deck that's currently in their backyard is preventing that dream from becoming a reality.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Fatima Hates
programme.desc: Fatima has been asking David to build them a new deck for the last 20 years, but he manages to talk his way out of doing any real work.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Tanya Hates
programme.desc: Matt and Tanya have lived through years of renovations on their house, but the DIY deck Matt built as a gift for Tanya is a disaster waiting to happen.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Pam Hates
programme.desc: Don and Pam are close to retiring and want to be able to enjoy the next 20 years together in their beautiful backyard, but their 25-year-old deck is unsafe and needs a complete takedown and rebuild.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Brenda Hates
programme.desc: Brenda and Scott run a prop building business out of their home, and the noisy work often spills out onto their deck. Brenda is desperate for a quiet backyard retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: The Ultimate Luxury Deck with a Two-Story Waterfall
programme.desc: A couple challenges the crew to build a deck that maximizes their gorgeous views, and adds 1000 square feet of outdoor living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: All-New Deck For Repeat Client
programme.desc: A former Mega Decks customer buys a new house and needs a new deck. Find out if Andy and the build crew can live up to the client's heightened expectations and deliver a second mega deck that beats the first.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Miami
programme.desc: Ali travels to Miami and breaks his fast with a classic Cuba staple: empanadas. He then samples some fruits of the sea, with right-off-the-boat mahi mahi sandwiches and a fisherman's stew.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Albuquerque
programme.desc: While Albuquerque is known for hatch green chile and New Mex cuisine, Ali Khan discovers a lot more behind the hype. Ali goes sweet on a vegan waffle that delivers like a decadent desert; then makes way for the best green chile cheeseburger in town.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Charleston
programme.desc: Ali heads south to Charleston and starts the day off right with creamy grits topped with all the morning classics. Then a crab cake sandwich that's the talk of the town, followed by seafood-stuffed hushpuppies.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime Bbq
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is spending the day at Jacobsen Salt Co., in Netarts Bay, Oregon, one of the largest producers of handcrafted sea salt in America. Owner Ben Jacobsen takes Roger on a tour of the facility, showing him how to smoke sea salt.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the most creative chefs in the U.S. to get their mouthwatering secrets for meaty celebrations that include whole hog barbecue, buffalo meatloaf and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: A San Francisco Pop-Up Treat

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Shark Sighting on the Cape

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Motor City Deb-Olition Derby
programme.desc: Debi Mazar loves Motown, classic cars and American history, so it’s only fitting that she, Gabriele Corcos and their family stop in Detroit. The family heads over to Eastern Market where they meet with Chef Phil Jones.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Cowboys Cook It Better in Texas
programme.desc: Gabriele Corcos and family drive through Texas, stopping by Snow's BBQ, the Zubik House food truck and an authentic Texas boot shop.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Ice Cream
programme.desc: If you like ice cream, you will be wowed by these unique treats. How about bourbon and corn flakes flavoured scoops at Humphry Slocombe? Or the sweets at Sweet Rose Creamery where everything from the cones to the chocolate chips are made from scratch.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Chocolate

programme.title: Unique Eats: Seafood

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Power Couples
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite food combinations got hitched. Michael traces the origins of peanut butter and jelly to the trenches of World War II, sees how spaghetti and meatballs went from Italy to America.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hungry Eyes
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean chases rainbows to explain how our food's color can leave us tickled pink or feeling blue. Michael uncovers if cheddar cheese is really orange and if color can cause a taste bud blackout.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Eat To Win
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes to bat finding out how our favorite stadium goods got tickets to the big leagues. Michael traces the football tailgate to a Civil War battlefield, shows how important the hot dog is to baseball's existence.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Breadly Combinations
programme.desc: Michael opens up a sandwich discussion and cuts the crust off some 'deli-cut' issues. He finds out if the sandwich was actually named after a guy named sandwich, the correct name for an Italian sandwich.

programme.title: Good Eats: Orange Aid

programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Floating Stone/The Light In the Storm
programme.desc: Mazu and Rocky must work together to save Tiny and Bill from Terminonator. Bill and Marsh are separated from their friends in a storm and must face their fears to get home.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hot Dog Daze Afternoon/ Super Sweet Helpers
programme.desc: On Mickey's day off, he continues getting called back to help at the garage. The Happy Helpers look after Mrs. Sweetums' candy store and factory.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Snow-Go with the Flow / Happy Helpers on Ice!
programme.desc: Minnie's plans for everyone on a trip to the Swiss Alps are interrupted by the Kai family's first experience with snow!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Way of the Woofy/ Werejalinos
programme.desc: When the Wolfies steal a local dog, the PJ Masks must try to get it back! The PJ Masks team up with Night Ninja to stop the Wolfies from destroying Mystery Mountain.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Top Elf
programme.desc: 'Elf-testants' compete in holiday-themed challenges to have their wish lists granted for someone in their community.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Anti-Poof
programme.desc: For every fairy, there's an anti-fairy - thus anti-Poof is born -FOOP!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Two and a Half Babies/ Dust Busters
programme.desc: Chet Ubetcha quits his job. Dad becomes the new news man. Timmy must get Chet back in order to save the city. Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theozilla/ Doggone It
programme.desc: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant. Later, when all the phones at school are missing, Alvin is blamed and he tries to clear his name.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Talkin' Teddy/ Principal Interest
programme.desc: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's love at first sight.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Tree House/ Saving Simon
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they made it their home. Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to stop his departure and keep him at home.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?
programme.desc: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it's really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hard Copy/ Parent Hoods
programme.desc: Wanda leaves Timmy a magic photocopier; Timmy meets a couple who look like his parents.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Main Drain/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Trenchbillies/ Sponge-Cano
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick fall into a cavern where frightful Trenchbillies keep them hostage.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side / Earworm
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say 'no'; SpongeBob has a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Pteranodon't!
programme.desc: When a child becomes stranded in the Pteranodon aviary Own must make a daring rescue.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Free Samples
programme.desc: After Plankton drives away Mr. Krabs' customers, Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free Krabby Patties to try to win them back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Accidents Will Happen/ The Other Patty
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is manipulated into caring for Squidward when he gets injured on the job. Mr. Krabs and Plankton both have troubles at the new 'Flabby Patty' restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidward's School for Grown Ups/ Oral Report
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.desc: Evil doppelgangers terrorize a vacationing family.

programme.desc: After her daughter disappears a woman raises her young grandson.

programme.title: Ernie & Joe: Crisis Cops
programme.desc: Ernie Steven and Joe Smarro are putting compassionate policing practices into action. This film chronicles their daily encounters with people in crisis, showing how an innovative approach to policing is having a dramatic effect.

programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Jungle Love
programme.desc: Two survivalists are challenged to survive the Nicaraguan rain forest. Battling freezing nights, severe dehydration and each other, they must work together to survive even though one is a vegetarian and the other is a meat eater.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Strength in Pain
programme.desc: An adventuress and a wilderness instructor take on the Honduras rainforest. They survive punishing storms and frigid nights, but a terrifying, close encounter with a deadly snake brings this pair to the breaking point.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Resentment, Rain and Rivers
programme.desc: A group of three struggles with their team dynamic while torrential rains and large cats threaten a duo deep in the jungles of Ecuador. Meanwhile, a single mom and a special ops vet battle the Sai Rung River Valley in Thailand.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pink Slime

programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Search for Nefertiti's Mummy
programme.desc: New technology might help experts track down Nefertiti's missing mummy, an investigation that could reveal new secrets about one of ancient Egypt's most powerful women.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Stonehenge: The Forbidden History
programme.desc: Experts use the latest technology to reveal how a primitive civilization built one of the world's greatest structures, Stonehenge.

programme.title: Crime 360: Payback
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the murder of a man found riddled with bullet holes after his van crashed in front of a house in a quiet neighbourhood.

programme.title: Crime 360: Killing Field
programme.desc: On the morning of July 5th, the body of a victim is found in an abandoned lot that had been used to shoot off guns the night before in celebration in Independence Day. More than 60 shell casings are collected from the crime scene.

programme.title: City Confidential: Detroit: A Co-ed's Secret Life
programme.desc: A student, who leads a double life as a prostitute, begins a relationship with a drifter.

programme.title: City Confidential: Milwaukee: The Legend of Bambi Bembenek
programme.desc: A curvaceous former Playboy Bunny was charged with the murder of her husband's ex-wife.

programme.title: City Confidential: Deadly Odds in Biloxi
programme.desc: The shocking murders of attorney Vince Sherry and his politically active wife Margaret.

programme.title: City Confidential: Bad News in Battle Creek
programme.desc: Residents of a peaceful Michigan city are shocked when a local TV anchorwoman is murdered.

programme.title: Crime 360: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A coroner finds that a victim's body shows signs of blunt force trauma to the head.

programme.title: Crime 360: Gilpin Court Shooting
programme.desc: Jaime is called to a possible homicide; learned victim ran 100 yards before dying. The victim banged on a couple of doors crying for help before falling down and dying.

programme.title: American Justice: Who Killed the Candy Heiress?: The Helen Brach Story
programme.desc: The strange case of candy heiress Helen Brach, who disappeared without a trace in 1977.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: In Austin, Texas, a man is shot by someone he trusts and Kim and Audrey must wait until the gunman is apprehended before they can begin treatment.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Heroes Among Us
programme.desc: When the men and women serving New Orleans get word that one of their own has been critically injured, they reflect on the risks they all take.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Lost in the Swamp
programme.desc: Deputy Keith Bergeron goes deep in the bayou to check out a report of someone burning trash, but finds himself outnumbered by several angry locals.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Catfish and Gators
programme.desc: When a vicious alligator attacks a dog, Deputy Melissa 'Catfish' Quintal calls in her alligator hunter boyfriend, Jacob Lirette, known as the 'Gator Man', to handle it. Also, deputies are sent in the dead of night to the eeriest bayous they've ever seen.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bone in My Swamp
programme.desc: Deputy Fitch heads to the docks to meet with a shrimper who believes he's caught a human bone in his shrimp net.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Hunt for the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: Sgt. Authement gets a call about a disturbance on a shrimping vessel, and calls in the SWAT team when he learns the captain has taken a deckhand hostage.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Full Moon Madness
programme.desc: Detectives try to track down a gang of thieves that are preying on empty camps in the deep bayou.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Biker Thieves
programme.desc: An organized ring of motorcycle thieves has been striking every six months, stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of motorcycles in a single night.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A case that involves cocaine, morphine and a strange love triangle leads the Squad into the community for a street bust.

programme.title: Betrayed: Deadly Crush
programme.desc: 25-year-old Corey Parker is looking for fun and sun when she moves to the beach side town of Jacksonville, Florida. But someone in her new circle of friends has murderous intent that will end her life.

programme.title: Betrayed: Suited for Murder
programme.desc: After two kids and two divorces, Charleston, West Virginia native Kathy Goble was making herself a priority for the first time in her life. However, her carefree ways soon catch up to her and she is betrayed in the most brutal way possible.

programme.title: Shattered: The Darkside
programme.desc: Brandi McClain falls in love with a handsome and famous skateboarder known as 'Gator.' Though Gator claims to find God with the help of a well-meaning preacher, no one knows that his dark side lurks dangerously close to the surface.

programme.title: Shattered: Butcher on Mincey Road
programme.desc: When a woman's marriage takes a violent turn, her daughter seeks refuge at the nearby home of a caring neighbor. She has no idea, however, that the place she considers a safe haven is not at all what it seems.

programme.title: Shattered: Do You Know My Voice?
programme.desc: Linda Hardin is convinced Grant is the perfect husband. In 2017, when he's arrested for murder, Linda believes police have the wrong man. Then officers show up at her door with evidence of another crime and her devotion is put to the test.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Taken in Tennessee
programme.desc: In 2011, 20-year-old Holly Bobo was abducted from her home in rural Tennessee. A search turned up some of her personal items, including her cell phone. But Holly was gone. The trail went cold for two years until a hunter made a gruesome find.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Missing on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A mother's worst nightmare becomes a reality when her 12-year-old son is abducted on Christmas Eve. Detective Waters soon learns this was not the first time the child went missing.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Taken in Tennessee
programme.desc: In 2011, 20-year-old Holly Bobo was abducted from her home in rural Tennessee. A search turned up some of her personal items, including her cell phone. But Holly was gone. The trail went cold for two years until a hunter made a gruesome find.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Missing on Christmas Eve

programme.title: Shattered: Do You Know My Voice?
programme.desc: Linda Hardin is convinced Grant is the perfect husband. In 2017, when he's arrested for murder, Linda believes police have the wrong man. Then officers show up at her door with evidence of another crime and her devotion is put to the test.

programme.title: Shattered: Mother's Little Helpers
programme.desc: 2001. A son's visit home turns into a desperate search for his missing father. A detective uncovers a murder with a stunning revelation about a group of children, and a mother struggles to believe her son could be involved in a vicious crime.

programme.title: Shattered: Cowboy Killer
programme.desc: 2001. An 11-year-old girl makes a gruesome discovery in her own home.. a woman desperate to reach her mother has a sickening feeling something horrible has happened... and a homicide detective is assigned a murder case that will rattle her to her core.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of the Rising Gun
programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans -- complete with a nice family next door. All is well until a robbery at the neighbor's home leads first to misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and horrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Welcome to Murder Street
programme.desc: An elite California Lakeside Community is rocked to its core when two well-to-do gentlemen go to war over an 18-inch property line discrepancy. One neighbor takes the dispute to new levels when he hires a hitman to permanently solve the problem.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Dateline: The Long Road
programme.desc: Patricia Esparza believed she'd escaped poverty and abuse, becoming a respected psychology professor. But a dark secret comes back to haunt her when a determined investigator works to solve a 20-year-old murder case.

programme.title: Dateline: The Stranger
programme.desc: She vanished into thin air. Who might have played a role in the mysterious disappearance of Brittany Tavar? There was a handsome boarder and the friend turned enemy or did the free spirit just up and leave on her own?

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bloody Matrimony
programme.desc: Steve Dingle, a young Filipino immigrant, returns to his homeland to find a bride. It seems like a match made in heaven when he meets Cathy. But pressure builds in their marriage that will explode into infidelity, violence, and murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder, Modesty, and the Pastor
programme.desc: Corinne isn't a demanding woman - she just wants what many lonely people want: a second chance at love. And when she meets Calvin Stoudt she finally gets it. But a too-close roommate and a monstrous past turn this second chance into a deadly battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Ambition to Die For
programme.desc: Dino's long work hours and missing bail jumper make his wife suspicious. Then a hidden secret is revealed.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Rookie Mistake
programme.desc: Carli wants to be a cop instead, she marries one. And Jeff takes his role as protector a little more seriously than fun-loving Carli can handle. Her attempts to break free from the confines of wedlock sets off a chain of deadly events.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: We'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 14-Mile House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis juggles two projects in Detroit, and since both were built in 1928, she uses one house as inspiration for the other's renovations. When a car crashes into the house next door, she makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 25th Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis works to restore a 1920s bungalow and must tackle a ton of brickwork. Then, she transforms the unfinished attic into a one-of-a-kind master suite and restores the kitchen cabinets to create one of the home's most dazzling features.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Campbell Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis returns to her hometown of Detroit to save a 1920s home that suffered severe damage from a fire next door.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.desc: The kitchen was originally designed as a place for servants to work and eat, but Wes and Carre remodel it to make it functional for modern-day use.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ain't Seen Nothing Yet
programme.desc: After hiring her neighbour to renovate her kitchen, Lali has nothing but a demo to show for the $11,000 she paid him.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Crazy Cheesy
programme.desc: We're bringing you the ooiest and gooiest cheese dishes this country has to offer. From fried cheese curds in Wisconsin to lasagna grilled cheese in Cleveland, we're trying them all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Sir Kermit the Brave/ Animal Fly Airplane
programme.desc: When the Muppet Babies think Miss Nanny has been captured by a dragon, they set off to rescue her! During an imaginary flight to Paris, no one will let Animal take the wheel!
