programme.desc: When Night Ninja pushes the Ninjalinos too far, they become Owlette’s new sidekicks. When Greg doesn’t take care of Cameron's mini-car, it goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Best, Best Friend / Counting Kermits

programme.desc: An ad executive survives a plane crash when he gives up his flight to another man. He begins to fall for the man's widow, though she has no idea of his connection to her late husband.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Movie: The Old Man & the Gun

programme.desc: A family living on a farm in Pennsylvania finds mysterious crop circles in their fields, which suggest something more frightening to come.

programme.desc: A middle-aged divorcee experiences a sexual reawakening.

programme.desc: Under Lady Trieu's care, Angela undergoes an unconventional treatment while Agent Blake chases down a lead. Elsewhere, The Smartest Man in The World delivers a stunning defense of his past actions.

programme.desc: A cop who is killed while on the job is transformed into an ultra-sophisticated cyborg.

programme.title: Movie: True Lies
programme.desc: A secret agent on the trail of a group of terrorists puts his family at risk when they discover his true identity.

programme.title: Tracey Ullman's Show
programme.desc: Tracey Ullman introduces us to comic characters and impersonations of celebrities.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: The A-Team
programme.desc: Four war veterans attempt to clear their names when the military suspects them of committing a crime.

programme.title: Movie: For Love of the Game
programme.desc: A pitcher reflects back on his life and career as he works on throwing the perfect game.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Right
programme.desc: A young woman falls in love with a seemingly perfect guy, except he has one major flaw: he's a professional assassin. As the criminals who employ him start to come after him, she must decide if she'll run away or join in the mayhem.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween
programme.desc: 40 years after he killed five people, Michael Myers escapes from a secure mental hospital and returns to his hometown to hunt down the one woman who escaped his rampage, but she's spent years anticipating and preparing for his inevitable return.

programme.title: Movie: Road House
programme.desc: A professional bouncer from New York moves to Missouri to ensure that a rowdy bar is safer for the patrons and musicians. When trouble is started by a local businessman, an old friend comes to town to help protect the bar's liquor shipments from thugs.

programme.title: Shameless: A Little Gallagher Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: Frank and Mikey set off on a day of adventure around the city in pursuit of Mikey's dreams. Debbie discovers a new way to make money in the midst of a strike as Lip leans on his new friend for parenting advice. Carl gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A doctor who was wrongly convicted of murdering his wife escapes and goes in search of the real killer to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Movie: At Eternity's Gate
programme.desc: Painter Vincent van Gogh's last days play out in a sleepy country village in the south of France. Although his art is unappreciated by the locals, he finds beauty in even the most benign scenes, and a charismatic local priest helps lead him to Christ.

programme.title: Gigolos: Episode 7
programme.desc: An unscripted look at the personal lives of male escorts living and working in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: Family Pictures
programme.desc: Ray gets closer with Molly Sullivan when he realizes their family connection. Claudette comes to New York and discovers that Daryll is on Detective Perry's radar. Bunchy tries to leverage his heroism for a pay raise. Terry goes on a trip.

programme.title: Movie: American Assassin
programme.desc: After his fiancée is killed in a terrorist attack, a man is recruited by an elite CIA division. After receiving training from a Cold War veteran, he's sent to stop a rogue agent who has acquired a nuclear weapon and is set on sparking a global conflict.

programme.title: Movie: Double Team
programme.desc: An ex-spy and a weapons dealer team up to fight an extremely dangerous terrorist.

programme.title: Movie: Adrift
programme.desc: Following a devastating hurricane that shatters their sailboat, a young couple is stranded in the Pacific Ocean. With one of them crippled by a terrible injury, it's up to the other to guide the crippled vessel to land without any navigation equipment.

programme.title: Movie: At Eternity's Gate
programme.desc: Painter Vincent van Gogh's last days play out in a sleepy country village in the south of France. Although his art is unappreciated by the locals, he finds beauty in even the most benign scenes, and a charismatic local priest helps lead him to Christ.

programme.title: Movie: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: After a farmer's daughter convinces him to let a piglet live, the pig turns to a wise spider to keep him alive.

programme.title: Movie: The Man Who Invented Christmas
programme.desc: After his last few books have flopped, author Charles Dickens is desperate for a hit. When the inspiration for 'A Christmas Carol' strikes, the characters seem to come to life before his eyes as he tries to get the book written in only a few weeks.

programme.title: Movie: The Impossible
programme.desc: A family finds themselves among thousands of victims and strangers in a natural catastrophe.

programme.title: Movie: Wildling
programme.desc: A teenager who was raised away from society tries to find out where she really came from.

programme.title: Movie: Rust Creek
programme.desc: An overachiever gets lost on her way to a job interview, and a wrong turn leaves her stranded.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Mama
programme.desc: Kate, a successful businesswoman, learns that she is infertile when she decides that she can no longer wait for Mr. Right to have a baby. When she runs out of options, Kate hires an obnoxious surrogate to carry her baby.

programme.title: Movie: Jack and Jill
programme.desc: A family man gets ready for the annual visit from his needy twin sister, Jill.

programme.title: Movie: Garfield: A Tail of Two Kitties
programme.desc: Garfield is mistaken for a cat that was bequeathed a lavish estate by his deceased owner.

programme.title: Movie: You Again
programme.desc: When a young girl learns that her brother is about to marry a woman who bullied her throughout high school, she sets out to expose her for what she really is.

programme.title: Movie: Extract
programme.desc: A man's extract production plant is in jeopardy after one employee is hurt on the job, and another employee is trying to scam the company for all its money. Not only is his business falling apart, but he also suspects his wife is cheating on him.

programme.title: Movie: The Kingdom
programme.desc: Following a terrorist attack on an American compound, a team of FBI agents travel to Saudi Arabia in hopes of uncovering and disabling a terrorist network. As the situation escalates, the agents grow increasingly frustrated with Saudi interference.

programme.title: Movie: The Skeleton Key

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Midnight Departure/ Cayenne Paws
programme.desc: Woman sues for return of security deposit; dog owner sues neighbor for vet bills.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff dated the Defendant but claims after he won a court settlement, he started throwing money around at the clubs and went to jail for abusing drugs. She is suing for unpaid child support.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'A Bad Bob', 'Taking Way Too Long' and 'Roughing Up A Roommate.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Arrested at My Own House/ True Colors
programme.desc: Man blames neighbor for arrest; overzealous fan seeks reimbursement for tickets.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Childhood friends dispute the damage of personal property. A woman is suing her friend for not paying back a loan.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: A Love Triangle Leads to Murder
programme.desc: A past guest on the show returns, but this time one of her sons has been murdered. The family believes it was his ex, whose baby might also be the son of the deceased.

programme.title: Maury: Will These DNA Tests Prove I Have 16 Grandchildren?
programme.desc: Briyah's here to prove to her ex Corey and his mom that Corey's the father of her two babies. Robert fear he's not the father of his wife's daughter. Cody is back, because a woman named Ali is determined to prove Cody fathered her son.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Suspicious Packages
programme.desc: Scotty wants to provide his girlfriend Bianca with a special prom experience she never enjoyed as a teenager. Just as he sets the mood, things rapidly go downhill after he confesses about sleeping with Bianca’s friend Pookie!

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Nine Months
programme.desc: A child psychiatrist panics when his girlfriend announces that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Movie: Little Fockers
programme.desc: A tightly wound father-in-law still has doubts about his son-in-law, even after 10 years of marriage to his daughter.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A 1950's Hollywood fixer for a movie company cleans up after big names and stars in the industry, but must deal with more than fixing problems when a star disappears.

programme.title: Movie: The Ref
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a cat burglar takes a bickering couple hostage and ends up providing counselling for them.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Crime ...
programme.desc: A hapless American couple touring Europe become suspects in a wacky murder investigation.

programme.title: Movie: Holes
programme.desc: A wrongly convicted young man is sent to a detention camp where he must dig mysterious holes in search of a treasure.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Arachnophobia
programme.desc: Deadly spiders from South America terrorize the residents of a small California town.

programme.title: Pete Holmes: Dirty Clean
programme.desc: Taped at the Aladdin Theatre in Portland, Oregon, Pete Holmes' latest comedy hour has him confronting personal truths around the mechanisms of consciousness, Michael Jackson, the afterlife, Elon Musk and being a new dad.

programme.title: Movie: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: A group of thieves are plotting to rob a casino and hide out in an elderly woman's basement.
